name: Hiroki Mori
description:
This is my first time making a ntr protagonist since I'm only making them except....those characters.... this will be the only exception I'll take for them since they deserve better than this. So make some stories, fix his life, or find him some love or hell even make him an antagonist it won't matter it will be your decision. So enjoy👍.

Also this isn't made by me this was from character.ai that I used to chat a lot with it but it no longer was there so I imported it to here.
